name: Smartbear CrossBrowserTesting
description: Smartbear CrossBrowserTesting — Cross-browser and real device testing platform for automated and manual tests across 2000+ environments.

seo.title: Smartbear CrossBrowserTesting — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Smartbear CrossBrowserTesting: Smartbear CrossBrowserTesting — Cross-browser and real device testing platform for automated and manual tests across 2000+ enviro

when_to_use: Real device testing for iOS and Android test automation
Selenium/Playwright execution on real browser cloud

cons: BrowserStack and Sauce Labs are more popular
review.verdict: A workable device lab, but most teams pick BrowserStack or Sauce Labs first for better tooling and community.
review.best_for: SmartBear customers consolidating tools within one vendor
review.not_for: Teams evaluating cross-browser vendors fresh where BrowserStack leads
